title: Shield Corrections
description: It can fix broken shield patterns and lowering shield for you
body:
This resource pack can fix banner patterns on shield and lowering its holding and blocking for you! :)
For Java Edition 1.9 to 1.20 and Bedrock Edition 1.20 Mods that are supported:
1.X (1.15 - Present): 1. Botania (1.1) 2. Additional Banners (1.2) 3. Immersive Engineering (1.2) 4. Ice and Fire Dragons (1.2) 5. Banner Additions (1.2) 6. Epic Knights Armor and Weapons (1.3) 7. Spartan Shields (1.3) 8. Better Shields (1.3) 9. Basic Shields (1.3) 10. Cooler Shields (1.3) 11. Extra Shields (1.3) 12. More Shields (1.3) 13. The Twilight Forest (1.4) 14. Lots of Shields (1.4) 15. Enderite (1.4) 16. SASSOT (1.5) 17. Upgraded Netherite (+ Ultimate & Creativerite) (1.5) 18. The Gems Project (1.5) 19. Shield Expansion (1.5) 20. Battle Shields (1.5) 21. Variant Shields (1.5) 22. Echo+ (1.5) 23. Fin's Extra Shields (for 1.19.x) (1.5) 24. Archaeology Banners (1.5) 25. Nyf's Banner Patterns (1.5) 26. Runelic (1.5) 27. Coins JE (1.5) 28. Megaman Armor (1.5) 29. Kobolds (1.5) Thanks for playing it!
